## Analyzers (1)

### Yeti `v1.0`
Fetch observable details from a YETI instance.

- **Author:** CERT-BDF
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `fqdn`, `ip`, `url`, `hash`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Yeti/Yeti.json)
